name: The Paradigm Shift
effect: Declare that a fundamental shift in thinking is required. This card is considered urgent.

clauses.name: DECLARATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When this card is played: All current initiatives are considered legacy.

clauses.name: ALIGNMENT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If no one agrees on the new paradigm: The shift is considered underway regardless.

clauses.name: CONTINUITY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: At end of turn: All systems continue operating exactly as before.

witness_quote: I think we all know what needs to change.
